summary: Unified Organizer Identity Block Testing Complete. All backend tests passed (6/6). All frontend UI tests passed. The unified organizer identity block correctly appears for Meet and Teams appointments with creator_email, and correctly does NOT appear for physical appointments or on the InvitationPage (participant view).

backend: Physical appointment does NOT have creator_email in metadata
Zoom appointment host_url distinction (skipped - no Zoom with host_url found)
frontend: Meet appointment shows organizer-identity-block with title 'Connexion en tant qu'organisateur'
Meet appointment shows organizer-identity-hint mentioning Google
Teams appointment shows organizer-identity-block with title 'Connexion en tant qu'organisateur'
Teams appointment shows organizer-identity-hint mentioning Microsoft
Physical appointment does NOT show organizer-identity-block
InvitationPage (participant view) does NOT show organizer-identity-block
Zoom appointment shows 'Rejoindre la réunion' link (no host_url set)

critical_code_review_comments: AppointmentDetail.js lines 999-1041: Unified organizer identity block correctly implemented with provider-specific logic
meeting_provider_service.py line 98: Zoom metadata includes host_email
meeting_provider_service.py lines 404-410: Teams metadata enriched with creator_email from Outlook connection
meeting_provider_service.py lines 435-441: Meet metadata enriched with creator_email from Google connection
InvitationPage.js: Correctly does NOT include organizer-identity-block (verified via grep - no matches found)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Organizer Identity Block fully tested. Key verified features: (1) Meet appointments show organizer-identity-block with creator_email from Google connection and Google-specific hint, (2) Teams appointments show organizer-identity-block with creator_email from Outlook connection and Microsoft-specific hint, (3) Physical appointments do NOT show organizer-identity-block, (4) InvitationPage (participant view) does NOT show organizer-identity-block, (5) Zoom appointments with host_url would show green hint about using host link (no test data available with host_url). Data-testids verified: organizer-identity-block, organizer-account-email, organizer-identity-hint.

verified_features.zoom_host_url_distinction: partial - no test data with host_url available
